event: Portrait of Saint Dorothy holding a basket of fruit and roses
symbols: basket of apples and roses — the miraculous gift from paradise, proof of the heavenly garden
red dress — the blood of martyrdom and passionate faith
green mantle — life, hope, and the paradise from which the fruits came
description: A full-length portrait of a young woman standing against a dark background. She wears an elegant red dress with white sleeves, a golden belt, and a voluminous olive-green mantle draped over one shoulder and arm. She has dark hair tied back with a ribbon and wears a thin golden halo. In her hands she holds a woven basket filled with apples, roses, and other fruits. Her expression is serene and gentle. An inscription reading 'S. DOROTEA' appears at the lower left corner.

_meta.title: Saint Dorothy full-length holding a basket of apples and roses
